title: A Thought From Propertius
content:
She might, so noble from head
To great shapely knees,
The long flowing line,
Have walked to the altar
Through the holy images
At Pallas Athene�s side,
Or been fit spoil for a centaur
Drunk with the unmixed wine.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Butler Yeats delivers a powerful performance in "A Thought From Propertius"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
